title: Aspendale Vanilla Plus
description: A client-side modpack to enhance the vanilla minecraft experience.
body:
## NOTE: Only available for Minecraft Java 1.20.1 [NeoForge] and Minecraft Java 1.21.4 [Fabric]. This modpack will soon be updated using Minecraft Optimus as a basis. ### About this modpack: This is a client-side modpack to be used with any vanilla Minecraft server, that enhances the visual and gameplay quality for a cinematic experience. This modpack also embeds some resourcepacks and shaderpacks recommended for use with this modpack: ### Resourcepacks: - [3D Crops Revamped](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-crops) - [Alternative Rain Sounds](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alternative-rain-sounds) - [Better Flame Particles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-flame-particles) - [Better Lanterns](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-lanterns) - [Better Nether Portal](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-nether-portal) - [Better Nether Wart](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-nether-wart/versions) - [Better Netherite](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-netherite-by-chacky) - [Cubic Sun & Moon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cubic-sun-moon) - [Dramatic Skys](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dramatic-skys) - [Enchant Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchant-icons-countxd) - [Mace but 3D](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mace-but-3d-resourcepack) - [Motschen's Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-leaves) - [Ray's 3D Ladders](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rays-3d-ladders) - [Ray's 3D Rails](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rays-3d-rails) - [Ray's Better Sugarcane](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-sugar-cane) ### Shaderpacks: - [BSL](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) - [BSL Classic](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders-classic) - [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) - [Complementary Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) - [Spooklementary](https://modrinth.com/shader/spooklementary) ### Known incompatibilites: - Palladium causes Create-mod connected textures to malfunction. ### _Currently only for Minecraft Java 1.20.1 [NeoForge] and Minecraft Java 1.21.4 [Fabric]_
We hope you enjoy the use of this modpack.
